headline: KFC makes key change that’s not on the menu
summary: Funny enough, the next fast-food war may not be fought over chicken sandwiches, sauces, or value meals. It might be fought over the restaurant itself, and that shift isn’t hard to spot. Taco Bell has tested futuristic drive-thrus. Chipotle built newer formats around digital pickup. Chick-fil-A has ...

headline: Chipotle is testing these 5 things to bring back buzz
summary: From a crispy chicken to renaming its group meals, Chipotle is considering various operational changes that could help drive sales and traffic.
